title: oxybaphus pilosus
intro: Oxybaphus pilosus, also known as the hairy four o'clock, is a flowering plant species native to North America. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, making it a potential treatment for various health issues. The health benefits of Oxybaphus pilosus include soothing digestive problems, reducing inflammation, and supporting the immune system. The plant can be prepared into herbal remedies such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
